description.en: How Hanbros UK (England and United Kingdom origin logistics) processes and retains personal data and how you exercise your rights on hanbroscargo.co.uk.

keyword.en: Hanbros UK privacy policy, cookies retention summary, UK GDPR KVKK compliance overview

text.en:
Informational only; not legal advice. Contact: info@hanbroscargo.co.uk.

Purposes

Quotes, contracts, customs filings, delivery and support may require identity and contact data.
